svg.title: RecipeGPT architecture diagram showing how modules connect
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing the flow from token IDs through embedding, transformer blocks, and the LM head, with expanded views of MultiHeadAttention and TransformerBlock internals.
svg.text: x shape: (batch, seq) → token IDs like [4, 6, 2956, 895, ...]
What happens when block(x, mask) is called
What happens when self.attention(x, mask) is called
